examples.title: Hiking North Then East
examples.content: You hike 3 km north, then 2 km east. Total distance: 5 km. Total displacement: √(3²+2²)=√13≈3.6 km at an angle. Vector addition!

examples.title: Two Ropes Pulling a Box
examples.content: Rope 1 pulls with 10 N north. Rope 2 pulls with 10 N east. Net force = √(10²+10²)≈14.1 N northeast. You add the vectors!

examples.title: Airplane Flying in Wind
examples.content: Plane flies 200 km/h north. Wind blows 50 km/h east. Actual velocity = √(200²+50²)≈206 km/h northeast. Velocity vectors add.
